subject: Docs Audit — Accuracy, Missing Images, Orphaned Pages, Broken Links
body:
## Documentation Audit — `docs/`

Full audit of the `docs/` folder against the five categories: accuracy, broken internal links, broken external links, missing images, and orphaned pages. No files were modified.

>⚠️ **Baseline caveat:** `docs/README.md` line 13 explicitly states _"This documentation is largely AI generated at this point and has not been reviewed."_ — accuracy issues are therefore expected throughout. The items below are the most concrete discrepancies found.

---

## 1. Accuracy Issues

### ⚠️ Warning — "Run now" behavior contradicted across two pages
- **`panels/Maintenance.md:50`** — _"Triggers an immediate maintenance run for all enabled tasks, **regardless of frequency history**."_
- **`features/maintenance-mode.md:148`** — _"**Frequency rules still apply** — the button only runs tasks that are: Enabled AND Eligible based on their frequency setting and last run time."_

These are directly contradictory. One of the two pages is incorrect. `features/maintenance-mode.md` includes a worked example ("if a weekly task ran yesterday, clicking Run now will skip it") suggesting that page is more authoritative, but the panel doc says the opposite.

### ⚠️ Warning — Prompt history keyboard shortcut mismatch
- **`features/entering-prompts.md:56`** — _"Use **Ctrl+↑** and **Ctrl+↓** to scroll through previously sent prompts."_
- **`reference/keyboard-shortcuts.md:116–117`** — Lists **Ctrl+Page Up** / **Ctrl+Page Down** for the same feature.

One source is wrong. The keyboard-shortcuts reference is more likely to be kept up-to-date.

### ⚠️ Warning — Inbox `from` field documented inconsistently
- **`features/inbox.md`** (also orphaned — see §4) says the `from` field must be `"coordinator"` or `"argus-weld"`.
- **`panels/Inbox.md`** correctly documents it as free-form text: _"The `from:` field is free-form text — by convention agents use their handle."_

###ℹ️ Info — Slash command cross-reference points to wrong page
- **`features/entering-prompts.md`** ends a section with: _"See the [Keyboard Shortcuts](../reference/keyboard-shortcuts.md) reference for the full list"_ — but the full slash-command list lives at `reference/slash-commands.md`, not keyboard shortcuts.

### ℹ️ Info — "Copilot CLI agent" copy-paste artifact
- **`features/paste-image.md:9`** — _"...so the **Copilot CLI agent** can analyse it using its `view` tool."_
- All other pages refer to the Squad agent, not Copilot CLI. This appears to be an AI-generation artifact.

### ℹ️ Info — `loop-file-custom-ui.md` may describe an unbuilt feature as current
- **`reference/loop-file-custom-ui.md`** contains a status note: _"The Loop Settings popup that renders these controls is not yet built."_
- If the Loop Settings popup has since been implemented, this note is outdated and should be removed.

---

## 2. Broken Internal Links

### ⚠️ Warning — Anchor fragment case mismatch
- **`features/hiring-agents.md`** links to `../reference/slash-commands.md#squadDash-ui-commands` (camelCase `D`).
- Standard Markdown processors (GitHub, GitBook, Jekyll) lowercase all anchor IDs, rendering `## SquadDash UI Commands` as `#squaddash-ui-commands`.
- The link fragment `#squadDash-ui-commands` will silently fail to scroll on most platforms.

---

## 3. Missing Images

45+ image references resolve to files that do not exist on disk. Most are accompanied by a `📸 *Screenshot needed*` placeholder comment, indicating they are known gaps. Grouped by source file:

| Source file | Missing images |
|---|---|
| `getting-started/first-run.md` | `main-window-agent-cards.png`, `transcript-panel-open.png`, `preferences-dialog-speech.png` |
| `features/entering-prompts.md` | `prompt-input-idle.png`, `prompt-input-abort.png`, `prompt-at-intellisense.png`, `prompt-at-accepted.png` |
| `features/attach-clipboard-text.md` | `attach-clipboard-text-pill.png` |
| `features/voice-input.md` | `voice-input-recording.png`, `voice-input-annotation.png` |
| `features/fullscreen-transcript.md` | `fullscreen-view-menu.png`, `fullscreen-transcript-active.png`, `fullscreen-prompt-peek.png` |
| `features/text-formatting.md` | `text-formatting-inline-code.png`, `text-formatting-code-fence.png`, `text-formatting-inline-quote.png` |
| `features/hiring-agents.md` | `hire-agent-result-sidebar.png` |
| `features/prompt-queue.md` | `prompt-queue-tabs.png`, `prompt-queue-tab-nav.png`, `prompt-queue-edit.png`, `prompt-queue-priority-feedback.png`, `prompt-queue-paused.png` |
| `panels/Tasks.md` | `tasks-panel-filter.png`, `tasks-filter-at-intellisense.png` |
| `concepts/agents.md` | `agent-cards-main-window.png`, `agent-transcript-multi-open.png` |
| `concepts/transcripts.md` | `transcript-panel-layout.png`, `transcript-quick-reply.png` |
| `reference/configuration.md` | `preferences-dialog-speech-config.png` |
| `reference/keyboard-shortcuts.md` | `tint-menu.png` |
| `reference/loop-file-templates.md` | `loop-settings-options-ui.png` |
| `reference/loop-file-custom-ui.md` | `loop-custom-ui-bool-checkbox.png`, `loop-custom-ui-enum-dropdown.png`, `loop-custom-ui-group-header.png`, `loop-custom-ui-text-input.png`, `loop-custom-ui-full-example.png` |
| `options/README.md` | `images/options-overview.png` (no `options/images/` folder exists) |
| `options/general.md` | `images/options-general.png` |
| `customization/Tinting and Themes.md` | `images/tint-swatches.png`, `images/tint-menu.png`, `images/accent-offset-menu.png` (no `customization/images/` folder exists) |

---

## 4. Orphaned Pages

Pages that exist on disk but are **not reachable** from `SUMMARY.md` or any other scanned doc page:

| File | Notes |
|---|---|
| `features/inbox.md` | Has `parent: Features` frontmatter but is **not** in `SUMMARY.md` and not linked from any page. Appears to be an earlier draft; `panels/Inbox.md` is the live version. |
| `features/inbox-selection-attach.md` | No frontmatter, not in `SUMMARY.md`, no inbound links found. |
| `decisions/screenshot-metadata-schema.md` | Architectural decision record; not in `SUMMARY.md`. Only referenced by `decisions/replay-ui-action-architecture.md` (also orphaned). |
| `decisions/replay-ui-action-architecture.md` | Architectural decision record; not in `SUMMARY.md`, not linked from any public doc. |
| `screenshots/README.md` | Describes screenshot test baselines; not in `SUMMARY.md`. Referenced only from `decisions/screenshot-metadata-schema.md`. |
| `loop-files/loop-fix-tagged-tasks.md` | A loop configuration/template file stored under `docs/`; not a documentation page; not in `SUMMARY.md`. |

---

## 5. Broken External Links

_Not checked — HTTP tooling not available in this environment. External links in the docs appear to reference stable targets (GitHub releases, dotnet.microsoft.com, nodejs.org, Wikipedia). Manual spot-check recommended._

---

## Summary

| Category | Count | Max Severity |
|---|---|---|
| Accuracy issues | 6 | ⚠️ Warning |
| Broken internal links | 1 | ⚠️ Warning |
| Missing images | ~45 | ℹ️ Info (all marked as known gaps) |
| Orphaned pages | 6 | ℹ️ Info |
| Broken external links | Not checked | — |

The two highest-priority items are the **"Run now" behavioral contradiction** (one of two pages is factually wrong) and the **prompt history shortcut mismatch** (Ctrl+↑/↓ vs Ctrl+Page Up/Down). Both affect core workflow documentation and should be resolved against the actual implementation.

actions.label: Fix accuracy issues
actions.prompt:
Arjun: the docs audit found two high-priority accuracy issues to fix in the SquadDash docs/. Please investigate the actual implementation and correct whichever doc is wrong:

1. **"Run now" behavior contradiction**
   - `docs/panels/Maintenance.md:50` says the Run Now button triggers a run "regardless of frequency history"
   - `docs/features/maintenance-mode.md:148` says "Frequency rules still apply" and only eligible (not-yet-due) tasks run
   - Check the actual implementation in theSquadDash source (look for the Run Now handler / maintenance cycle logic) and update whichever doc is incorrect.

2. **Prompt history keyboard shortcut mismatch**
   - `docs/features/entering-prompts.md:56` says Ctrl+↑ / Ctrl+↓
   - `docs/reference/keyboard-shortcuts.md:116-117` says Ctrl+Page Up / Ctrl+Page Down
   - Check the actual key bindings in the source and correct the wrong doc.

3. While you're in entering-prompts.md, also fix: the page says "See the [Keyboard Shortcuts](../reference/keyboard-shortcuts.md) reference for the full list" referring to slash commands, but the slash command list is in `reference/slash-commands.md`. Update the link target.

4. In `docs/features/paste-image.md:9`, the text says "Copilot CLI agent" — change it to refer to the Squad agent instead (matching the terminology used everywhere else in the docs).

Please verify each fix against the actual source code before committing.
actions.hint: Fix the four confirmed doc accuracy issues

actions.label: Fix broken anchor link
actions.prompt: Arjun: there is a broken anchor fragment in `docs/features/hiring-agents.md`. It links to `../reference/slash-commands.md#squadDash-ui-commands` (camelCase D), but standard Markdown processors lowercase all anchor IDs, so the target heading `## SquadDash UI Commands` renders as `#squaddash-ui-commands`. Please change the link fragment from `#squadDash-ui-commands` to `#squaddash-ui-commands` (all lowercase) in `docs/features/hiring-agents.md`.
actions.hint: One-line fix for a broken anchor fragment

actions.label: Review orphaned pages
actions.prompt:
Add a backlog task: Review the six orphaned documentation pages in docs/ and decide what to do with each.

Orphaned pages found:
1. `docs/features/inbox.md` — possible earlier draft of `panels/Inbox.md`; consider deleting or merging
2. `docs/features/inbox-selection-attach.md` — no frontmatter, no inbound links; evaluate whether to add to SUMMARY.md or delete
3. `docs/decisions/screenshot-metadata-schema.md` — ADR; decide whether to add a Decisions section to SUMMARY.md or keep as internal-only
4. `docs/decisions/replay-ui-action-architecture.md` — ADR; same as above
5. `docs/screenshots/README.md` — describes screenshot test baselines; probably fine to leave as-is but confirm it shouldn't be public-facing
6. `docs/loop-files/loop-fix-tagged-tasks.md` — a loop config file stored under docs/; probably should live elsewhere (e.g., `.squad/` or `loop-files/` at repo root)
actions.hint: Add to backlog: triage 6 orphaned doc pages

actions.label: Track screenshot backlog
actions.prompt:
Add a backlog task: The docs/ folder has approximately 45 missing screenshot images, all marked with '📸 Screenshot needed' placeholders. A systematic screenshot pass is needed across these files:
- getting-started/first-run.md (3 missing)
- features/entering-prompts.md (4 missing)
- features/voice-input.md (2 missing)
- features/fullscreen-transcript.md (3 missing)
- features/text-formatting.md (3 missing)
- features/prompt-queue.md (5 missing)
- features/hiring-agents.md (1 missing)
- features/attach-clipboard-text.md (1 missing)
- panels/Tasks.md (2 missing)
- concepts/agents.md (2 missing)
- concepts/transcripts.md (2 missing)
- reference/configuration.md, keyboard-shortcuts.md, loop-file-templates.md, loop-file-custom-ui.md (8 missing)
- options/README.md, options/general.md (2 missing)
- customization/Tinting and Themes.md (3 missing)
Note: the options/ and customization/ folders are also missing their `images/` subdirectory entirely.
actions.hint: Add to backlog: screenshot capture pass for docs
